tasks.summary: hooks/pre-commit.sh standards gate (Tier 2) per engineering-standards.md §Components 2 + §Rollback Plan. (5) On rc=0 silent return; on rc≠0 emit STANDARDS_BLOCK banner with fix hints (kebab-case rename, NDJSON logger reference, .tmp/.bak/.swp/.orig cleanup, secret-pattern strip) + rollback flag pointer + CLI report on stderr + exit 1. Sandbox seeds .ai/TASKS.md with generated header so check_markdown_sync doesn't fire first; file-based grep assertions (sub-shell var-scope trap fixed — same pattern as E-74). Full suite 1732 → 1754 PASS (+22, zero regressions; +67 total across E-80/E-81/E-82). Completes engineering-standards.md blueprint end-to-end. All Engineer tasks closed.
